  "description": "Trovest Capital Partners is a full-fledged Financial Service Hub, built strategically to play in the Consumer Lending Space. Our operations cover Investment Banking, Retail Banking, Wealth Management, Micro Lending, Payment Service Banking, Consumer Lending and Fintech.

As a catalyst for socio-economic development, The Tro-Vest Capital Partners Group launched its operations in 2021, to provide exceptional financial services while maintaining the highest level of integrity and professionalism to meet the current and future needs of our clients, helping them cultivate long term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Head, Tro-Vest Asset Management

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Job Summary


	To provide leadership to the Company, to drive the Grow AUM to NIOOBN and increase Asset Management Sales and Marketing of [Institutional, Retail, Corporates, Individual (HNIs &amp; UHNls), Counter Parties and Public Sector].


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor&#39;s Degree in any finance-related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience with an emphasis on asset management.


Key Responsibilities:


	Lead business development, treasury sales, and wealth management to grow assets.
	Drivedeposit mobilization across institutional, retail, and public sectors.
	Build client relationships and deliver tailored investment solutions.
	Identify growth opportunities and market financial products nationwide.
	Support strategy, product development and performance reporting.


Remuneration
Competitive salary, HMO, Pension.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@tro-vestcapitalpartners.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Head, Tro-Vest Asset Management Job at Trovest Capital Partners




        
    

        
        Trovest Capital Partners is a full-fledged Financial Service Hub, built strategically to play in the Consumer Lending Space. Our operations cover Investment Banking, Retail Banking, Wealth Management, Micro Lending, Payment Service Banking, Consumer Lending and Fintech.

As a catalyst for socio-economic development, The Tro-Vest Capital Partners Group launched its operations in 2021, to provide exceptional financial services while maintaining the highest level of integrity and professionalism to meet the current and future needs of our clients, helping them cultivate long term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Tro-Vest Asset Management

Job Location: Lagos
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	To provide leadership to the Company, to drive the Grow AUM to NIOOBN and increase Asset Management Sales and Marketing of [Institutional, Retail, Corporates, Individual (HNIs & UHNls), Counter Parties and Public Sector].


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor's Degree in any finance-related discipline.
	Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience with an emphasis on asset management.


Key Responsibilities:


	Lead business development, treasury sales, and wealth management to grow assets.
	Drivedeposit mobilization across institutional, retail, and public sectors.
	Build client relationships and deliver tailored investment solutions.
	Identify growth opportunities and market financial products nationwide.
	Support strategy, product development and performance reporting.


Remuneration
Competitive salary, HMO, Pension.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Trovest Capital Partners is a full-fledged Financial Service Hub, built strategically to play in the Consumer Lending Space. Our operations cover Investment Banking, Retail Banking, Wealth Management, Micro Lending, Payment Service Banking, Consumer Lending and Fintech.

As a catalyst for socio-economic development, The Tro-Vest Capital Partners Group launched its operations in 2021, to provide exceptional financial services while maintaining the highest level of integrity and professionalism to meet the current and future needs of our clients, helping them cultivate long term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Itrove Growth / Product Marketer (Fintech Product)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos

Job Summary


	We are looking for a high-perforrnance Growth/product Marketer with strong sales ability to drive aggressive acquisition, activation and conversion for the i-Trove investment platform.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales, deposits, and AUM growth for itrove.
	Execute marketing campaigns to increase user acquisition and conversion
	Simplify product messaging and optimize onboarding.
	Generate and convert leads using data-driven strategies.
	Track perforrnance and build partnerships to scale growth.


Requirements


	A Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Business, Finance, or a related field is required, along with 2 to 5 years of experience in fintech investment platforms, or digital&nbsp;sales.
	Candidates should possess strong sales skills, including the ability to close deals, and have experience in growth or performance marketing.


Remuneration
Competitive salary, HMO, Pension.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@tro-vestcapitalpartners.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Itrove Growth / Product Marketer (Fintech Product) Job at Trovest Capital Partners




        
    

        
        Trovest Capital Partners is a full-fledged Financial Service Hub, built strategically to play in the Consumer Lending Space. Our operations cover Investment Banking, Retail Banking, Wealth Management, Micro Lending, Payment Service Banking, Consumer Lending and Fintech.

As a catalyst for socio-economic development, The Tro-Vest Capital Partners Group launched its operations in 2021, to provide exceptional financial services while maintaining the highest level of integrity and professionalism to meet the current and future needs of our clients, helping them cultivate long term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Itrove Growth / Product Marketer (Fintech Product)
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	We are looking for a high-perforrnance Growth/product Marketer with strong sales ability to drive aggressive acquisition, activation and conversion for the i-Trove investment platform.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive sales, deposits, and AUM growth for itrove.
	Execute marketing campaigns to increase user acquisition and conversion
	Simplify product messaging and optimize onboarding.
	Generate and convert leads using data-driven strategies.
	Track perforrnance and build partnerships to scale growth.


Requirements


	A Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Business, Finance, or a related field is required, along with 2 to 5 years of experience in fintech investment platforms, or digital sales.
	Candidates should possess strong sales skills, including the ability to close deals, and have experience in growth or performance marketing.


Remuneration
Competitive salary, HMO, Pension.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Communications Specialist",
  "description": "Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today&rsquo;s dynamic and diverse market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Communications Specialist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for an enthusiastic Communications Specialist to manage our external and internal communications.


Responsibilities


	Develop effective corporate communication strategies
	Manage internal communications (memos, newsletters etc.)
	Draft content (e.g. press releases) for mass media or company website
	Organize initiatives and plan events or press conferences
	Liaise with media and handle requests for interviews, statements etc.
	Foster relationships with advocates and key persons
	Collaborate with marketing professionals to produce copy for advertisements or articles
	Perform &ldquo;damage control&rdquo; in cases of bad publicity
	Facilitate the resolution of disputes with the public or external vendors
	Assist in communication of strategies or messages from senior leadership


Requirements


	Experience as communications specialist
	Experience in web design and content production is a plus
	Experience in copywriting and editing
	Solid understanding of project management principles
	Working knowledge of MS Office; photo and video-editing software is an asset
	Excellent communication (oral and written) and presentation skills
	Outstanding organizational and planning abilities
	Proficient command of English


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to:&nbsp;nikemfollimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Communications Specialist Job at Nikemfol




        
    

        
        Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today’s dynamic and diverse market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Communications Specialist

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an enthusiastic Communications Specialist to manage our external and internal communications.


Responsibilities


	Develop effective corporate communication strategies
	Manage internal communications (memos, newsletters etc.)
	Draft content (e.g. press releases) for mass media or company website
	Organize initiatives and plan events or press conferences
	Liaise with media and handle requests for interviews, statements etc.
	Foster relationships with advocates and key persons
	Collaborate with marketing professionals to produce copy for advertisements or articles
	Perform “damage control” in cases of bad publicity
	Facilitate the resolution of disputes with the public or external vendors
	Assist in communication of strategies or messages from senior leadership


Requirements


	Experience as communications specialist
	Experience in web design and content production is a plus
	Experience in copywriting and editing
	Solid understanding of project management principles
	Working knowledge of MS Office; photo and video-editing software is an asset
	Excellent communication (oral and written) and presentation skills
	Outstanding organizational and planning abilities
	Proficient command of English


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Manager - E-Commerce & Retail Operations",
  "description": "Fortitude-IOT (FIOT) is an innovative integrated service and distribution company transforming how retail businesses connect with consumers. We leverage mobile technology, digital payments, and logistics optimization, Fortitude-IOT aims to provide seamless direct-to-consumer channels for retail businesses across various industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager - E-Commerce &amp; Retail Operations

Job Location:&nbsp;Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Managing Director

Position Summary


	The Operations Manager will oversee and optimize the day-to-day operations of the company&rsquo;s e-commerce platform and physical retail/logistics activities, ensuring seamless order fulfillment, inventory management, customer experience, and operational efficiency.
	The role requires a results-driven professional with strong experience in digital commerce operations, supply chain coordination, warehouse/last-mile delivery, and retail process management.


Key Responsibilities
Operational Leadership:


	Manage end-to-end operations across online sales channels and physical locations
	Develop and improve standard operating procedures (SOPs) for efficiency and scalability.
	Ensure smooth coordination between sales, logistics, warehousing, and customer service teams


E-Commerce Operations:


	Oversee order processing, fulfillment, returns, and delivery performance
	Monitor website/app operational workflows to ensure accuracy and speed
	Collaborate with IT/marketing teams to optimize platform performance and customer journey


Inventory &amp; Supply Chain Management:


	Manage stock levels across warehouses and physical outlets
	Implement inventory control systems to minimize stock-outs and overstocking
	Coordinate with suppliers and vendors to ensure timely replenishment


Logistics &amp; Fulfillment:


	Supervise warehousing, dispatch, and last-mile delivery operations.
	Negotiate and manage relationships with logistics partners
	Track KPIs such as delivery time, fulfillment accuracy, and costs.


Performance &amp; Cost Management:


	Develop operational budgets and control costs
	Analyze data to improve productivity and margins.
	Prepare regular operational performance reports


Team Management:


	Lead, train, and motivate operations staff
	Set performance targets and conduct reviews
	Foster a culture of accountability and continuous improvement


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Order fulfillment speed &amp; accuracy
	Inventory turnover ratio
	Logistics cost efficiency
	Customer satisfaction levels
	Operational cost savings


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s&nbsp;Degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, Supply Chain, Logistics, or related field
	5+ years of experience in operations management within E-commerce, retail, logistics, or omnichannel businesses
	Proven experience managing, warehousing &amp; fulfillment, inventory systems, online order workflows
	Strong understanding of last-mile delivery operations (especially in urban markets).
	MBA or professional certifications in operations/supply chain are an added advantage


Core Competencies &amp; Skills:


	Strong operational planning and execution
	Data-driven decision making
	Inventory &amp; supply chain optimization
	Process improvement &amp; automation mindset
	Excellent leadership and people management skills
	Problem-solving under fast-paced conditions
	Proficiency with ERP systems, e-commerce dashboards, and inventory software


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance bonuses
	Opportunity to scale a fast-growing omnichannel business
	Dynamic, entrepreneurial work environment
	Career growth and leadership exposure


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and a brief Cover Letter to:&nbsp;careers@fortitudeiot.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-01",

Operations Manager - E-Commerce & Retail Operations Job at Fortitude-IOT (FIOT)




        
    

        
        Fortitude-IOT (FIOT) is an innovative integrated service and distribution company transforming how retail businesses connect with consumers. We leverage mobile technology, digital payments, and logistics optimization, Fortitude-IOT aims to provide seamless direct-to-consumer channels for retail businesses across various industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Manager - E-Commerce & Retail Operations

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Managing Director

Position Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Operations Manager will oversee and optimize the day-to-day operations of the company’s e-commerce platform and physical retail/logistics activities, ensuring seamless order fulfillment, inventory management, customer experience, and operational efficiency.
	The role requires a results-driven professional with strong experience in digital commerce operations, supply chain coordination, warehouse/last-mile delivery, and retail process management.


Key Responsibilities
Operational Leadership:


	Manage end-to-end operations across online sales channels and physical locations
	Develop and improve standard operating procedures (SOPs) for efficiency and scalability.
	Ensure smooth coordination between sales, logistics, warehousing, and customer service teams


E-Commerce Operations:


	Oversee order processing, fulfillment, returns, and delivery performance
	Monitor website/app operational workflows to ensure accuracy and speed
	Collaborate with IT/marketing teams to optimize platform performance and customer journey


Inventory & Supply Chain Management:


	Manage stock levels across warehouses and physical outlets
	Implement inventory control systems to minimize stock-outs and overstocking
	Coordinate with suppliers and vendors to ensure timely replenishment


Logistics & Fulfillment:


	Supervise warehousing, dispatch, and last-mile delivery operations.
	Negotiate and manage relationships with logistics partners
	Track KPIs such as delivery time, fulfillment accuracy, and costs.


Performance & Cost Management:


	Develop operational budgets and control costs
	Analyze data to improve productivity and margins.
	Prepare regular operational performance reports


Team Management:


	Lead, train, and motivate operations staff
	Set performance targets and conduct reviews
	Foster a culture of accountability and continuous improvement


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Order fulfillment speed & accuracy
	Inventory turnover ratio
	Logistics cost efficiency
	Customer satisfaction levels
	Operational cost savings


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, Supply Chain, Logistics, or related field
	5+ years of experience in operations management within E-commerce, retail, logistics, or omnichannel businesses
	Proven experience managing, warehousing & fulfillment, inventory systems, online order workflows
	Strong understanding of last-mile delivery operations (especially in urban markets).
	MBA or professional certifications in operations/supply chain are an added advantage


Core Competencies & Skills:


	Strong operational planning and execution
	Data-driven decision making
	Inventory & supply chain optimization
	Process improvement & automation mindset
	Excellent leadership and people management skills
	Problem-solving under fast-paced conditions
	Proficiency with ERP systems, e-commerce dashboards, and inventory software


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance bonuses
	Opportunity to scale a fast-growing omnichannel business
	Dynamic, entrepreneurial work environment
	Career growth and leadership exposure


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV and a brief Cover Letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT Consultant",
  "description": "Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today&rsquo;s dynamic and diverse market

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Consultant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are currently seeking a highly knowledgeable IT Consultant to join our team.


Responsibilities


	Understand customer requirements and business objectives
	Provide strategic advice on using technology to achieve goals
	Manage IT initiatives and collaborate with in-house technical staff
	Design IT systems and networks ensuring the right architecture and functionality
	Support new technology implementation
	Train users in new and existing IT systems
	Provide assistance with technical issues
	Revise existing systems and suggest improvements
	Produce reports


Requirements


	Experience as IT Consultant
	Ability to troubleshoot hardware,software and network problems
	Experience with various operating systems and databases
	Experience in project management
	An analytical mind with problem-solving abilities
	A team player with excellent communication and presentation skills
	Customer service orientation
	Interpersonal skills.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their detailed CV to:&nbsp;nikemfollimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

IT Consultant Job at Nikemfol




        
    

        
        Nikemfol is an emerging fashion brand dedicated to designing and delivering high-quality, contemporary apparel for modern consumers. We specialize in creating stylish, culturally inspired fashion pieces that combine creativity, craftsmanship, and innovation.

Our brand is built on the principles of authenticity, quality, and self-expression. We aim to redefine modern fashion by blending trend-conscious designs with timeless aesthetics, ensuring our collections resonate with today’s dynamic and diverse market

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT Consultant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description

	We are currently seeking a highly knowledgeable IT Consultant to join our team.

	Understand customer requirements and business objectives
	Provide strategic advice on using technology to achieve goals

	Design IT systems and networks ensuring the right architecture and functionality
	Support new technology implementation
	Train users in new and existing IT systems

	Experience as IT Consultant
	Ability to troubleshoot hardware,software and network problems
	Experience with various operating systems and databases
	Experience in project management
	An analytical mind with problem-solving abilities
	A team player with excellent communication and presentation skills
	Customer service orientation
	Interpersonal skills.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly.
